title: arachnites atratus
intro: Arachnites atratus, also known as the lady's mantle or arachnid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a styptic, helping to stop bleeding and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Arachnites atratus include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Arachnites atratus can be prepared as an herbal infusion or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, from skin conditions to respiratory issues.
